ocr_text.text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive.
Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.
AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine.
La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes
AVERTISSEMENT : La nicotine crée une forte ovy
Therapie de remplacement de la nicotine
This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.
Ce produit peut ne pas vous convenir. Toujours lire l'étiquette et suivre le mode d'emploi.

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a white background, with the ZONNIC logo in navy blue and a green halo around the C. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, and the headline asks 'New to ZONNIC?' with a brief instructional prompt. The colour palette matches the Green/Mint flavour.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image features a ZONNIC product tin centered on a white background, with the ZONNIC logo in navy blue and a green halo around the C. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, and the headline asks 'New to ZONNIC?' with a brief instructional prompt. The colour palette matches the Green/Mint flavour.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center (on product tin), also top center (headline)
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: medium (on tin), large (headline)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: green (matches Green/Mint palette)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): NO — solid single colour ⚠
  Gradient colours: green
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: white
  Colours: white with subtle light grey shadow under tin
  Description: Solid white background with a slight shadow under the product tin

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top of image (large block), also on tin
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: PRESENT
    Position: bottom left
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom of image

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: bold sans-serif (logo and headline), regular sans-serif (body and regulatory text)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: New to ZONNIC? Here's how it works...

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, green, white
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint
  Secondary colour usage: accent (green used for C halo and tin edge, not dominant)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features the ZONNIC logo in navy blue, centered on a white background, with a green halo around the C. The logo is shown both in the headline and on the product tin, and the halo is circular and proportional. Regulatory elements are present: a bilingual nicotine warning at the top, an 18+ icon at the bottom left, and risk communication text at the bottom. The colour palette matches the Green/Mint flavour, and the secondary green is used as an accent. Typography is consistent with bold and regular sans-serif fonts. However, the halo around the C is a solid green colour, not a gradient, which is required for white backgrounds. All other elements follow the guidelines, but the halo's lack of gradient is a critical issue that must be corrected for compliance.

checks_performed.detail: Nicotine warning is present at the top and is bilingual (English and French).
18+ icon is visible at the bottom left of the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC logo is clearly visible in the headline and on the product tin.
Logo text is navy blue on a white background, which is correct.
Halo is present and correctly placed on the C, but it is a solid colour instead of a gradient, which is required for white backgrounds.
Logo is unmodified, no gradients in text, no outlines, no distortion, and no stacking.
Background is solid white, not a gradient or image.
No gradient background is used, so gradient direction and split rules do not apply.
Educational content uses a white background with secondary colour as accent, which is allowed.
Only approved brand colours are used, matching the Green/Mint flavour palette.
Santral sans-serif font is used throughout, with correct weights and formatting.
No grey gradient background is used, so these rules do not apply.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it; no elements intrude into the safety zone.
Halo does not blend into the background, flavour matches, and logo is not placed in any shape or container.

violations.rule_text: On a white or grey gradient background, the C halo must always use the full gradient, consisting of both the primary and secondary colours.
violations.issue: The halo around the C is a solid green colour instead of a gradient, which is required for white backgrounds.
violations.fix_suggestion: Update the C halo to use a gradient consisting of both the primary and secondary Green/Mint colours, not a solid colour.
violations.evidence: Halo is detected as solid green, not gradient, on a white background.

violations.rule_text: Secondary/accent colours must not be used as the dominant background colour.
violations.issue: A secondary/accent colour is being used as the main background colour instead of as a small accent.
violations.fix_suggestion: Use the secondary colour only for small accents (halo, icons). Use white, navy, or a brand gradient as the background.
violations.evidence: Brand detection found secondary colour usage: 'accent (green used for c halo and tin edge, not dominant)'.
